change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Added default font provider wrapper with injectable file-system lookup for deterministic tests.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Added lazy global font mapper singleton wiring.

change_categories: Java PDFBox composite-font metadata access adapted to existing .NET font model
note: Issue #51: added CIDSystemInfo accessor to support Type0 CMap/UCS2 integration heuristics.

change_categories: Java PDFBox descendant CIDFontType0 integration verified via Type0 CMap path tests
note: Issue #51: no API expansion required beyond inherited CID behavior; integration coverage added for Type0 CMap-driven CID and widths.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Implemented CIDFontType2 wrapper for embedded TrueType fonts with shared CID width default handling.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Added CID system info wrapper for Registry/Ordering/Supplement.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Replaced font stubs with concrete PDModel font hierarchy, descendant descriptor fallback, and CID width handling for composite fonts.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Added PDFontDescriptor metric normalization, flag helpers, panose access, and descriptor dictionary accessors.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Added font factory dispatch based on PDF font subtype.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Added PANOSE classification wrapper.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Implemented simple-font width, glyph, and encoding-backed unicode fallback behavior, with constructor-level Type1 encoding injection.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Implemented TrueType font loading and cmap-backed unicode fallback behavior.

change_categories: Java PDFBox composite-font CMap semantics adapted to existing .NET font model
note: Issue #51: added /Encoding CMap parsing, predefined Identity-H/V fallback CMap, descendant-CJK UCS2 lookup attempt, and Type0 ToUnicode fallback chaining to descendant mapping.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Implemented Type1 loading with embedded PFB/segment parsing, mapped system-font fallback loading, and embedded encoding precedence.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Adjusted Type3 font stub constructor to align with PDFont base constructor requirements.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Added canonical mapping for standard 14 PDF fonts with expanded upstream alias matrix compatibility names.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Implemented dictionary encoding resolution and Differences overrides, including Symbol/ZapfDingbats Standard14 fallback routing.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Added PDModel encoding base class.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Added MacRoman encoding wrapper for PDModel fonts.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Added Symbol encoding map for PDModel fonts.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Added Type1 built-in encoding adapter from parsed Type1 fonts.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Added WinAnsi encoding map for PDModel fonts.

change_categories: Java PDFBox font model semantics adapted to existing .NET architecture and available dependencies
note: Added ZapfDingbats encoding map for PDModel fonts.

change_categories: Java syntax leftovers -> C# syntax equivalents
note: Straight mechanical conversion of a low-dependency pdfbox utility class.

change_categories: Java generic trie node handling adapted to C# nullable/value-type semantics
note: Uses an explicit has-value flag so enum-backed default values behave like Java nullability.

change_categories: Mechanical enum port
note: Direct enum parity for supported file-signature classifications.

change_categories: Java BufferedInputStream mark/reset handling adapted to seekable Stream semantics
note: Preserves byte-array detection semantics and restores stream position after signature probing.

change_categories: JUnit assertions/annotations converted to xUnit v3
note: Straight conversion of dictionary-vs-stream inequality regression check.

change_categories: JUnit assertions/annotations converted to xUnit v3
Fixture-dependent integration scenario omitted from this foundational unit-test slice
note: Converted deterministic COSObjectKey unit checks; PDFBOX-5742 fixture-driven integration test remains outside this primitive/container slice.

change_categories: JUnit assertions/annotations converted to xUnit v3
note: Direct conversion of encoding deviation and PDFBOX-3864 behavior checks.

change_categories: JUnit assertions/annotations converted to xUnit v3
Java collection initializers adapted to C# list/collection expressions
note: Converted upstream COSArray test coverage with direct parity assertions for container/list conversion semantics.

change_categories: JUnit assertions/annotations converted to xUnit v3
PDModel-dependent integration checks adapted to COS-layer unit checks
note: Mapped upstream COSName escape-sequence behaviors to direct COSName/COSDictionary assertions in the current dependency scope.

change_categories: JUnit assertions/annotations converted to xUnit v3
Upstream filter-dependent stream coverage ported for single and multi-filter encode/decode parity
